notes.introduction: An exposition of Revelation 4:2-11 (part two of a three-part series) on the identity and activity of the twenty-four elders in the heavenly throne room, drawing on parallel passages in Revelation 3, 5, 19, and selected Old and New Testament texts to argue that the elders represent the redeemed church.
themes: the church as bride of christ

sections.heading: Identity of the Twenty-Four Elders Introduced
Crowns as Rewards, Not Royal Insignia
What the Elders Are Doing: Worship
Observations on Worship in the Passage
Why Twenty-Four: Representatives of the Redeemed
Matthew 19 and Ephesians 2 as Supporting Texts
